productName: HashBreak - Hashbreak 2 Pack - Pink Lemonade Candy - 1g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Pink Lemonade supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of grapefruit, lemon, and citrus, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
